privileged_info_summary: The Oracle database task involves syncing an EMPLOYEES table with a MARKET_SALARY_SURVEY table. Based on the data in setup_task.sh, 15 existing employees have salaries below 90% of the market rate and should be updated. 17 existing employees have salaries at or above 90% of the market rate and should not be updated. 8 new records in the survey have no employee ID and should be inserted. The new audit table must be named SALARY_CHANGE_LOG, the staging table is MARKET_SALARY_SURVEY, and the final report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/reconciliation_report.txt.
